transcript: Tess is guarding the door. Vincent, from the first time we talked, you said that you were trying to find something to keep you from... Okay, but what about Merfield? There'd be less risk of exposing yourself to them. Maybe we could actually go to a movie or a hotel pool, and we wouldn't need to worry about something setting you off. You know, I thought that you said that you're okay with all of this. Vincent, I am. Aren't you curious? This is the guy that you held up to be someone who could give me more. And it turns out that he's exactly like you. So you want to go to a movie theater? Don't you? Private elevator and garage. There's a presidential suite made for presidents. And Gabe, apparently. Tyler, where the hell are you? You know, it would be kind of fun to stay in a place like this someday. I did tell you they have a rooftop pool. Yes. What? Gunshots. I didn't hear. Thought I heard. Gabe? Gabe! Oh, my God. Where's Gabe? He's not here. How do you get out of here? The only way out is that way. So wait, he's all creatured out on the loose on the streets of Manhattan? I think so. Security's going to be here any minute. What are we going to tell them? What are we going to tell them? Well well this guy shot at gaden can't fought him off we'll say that there was another attacker and the roar the entire hotel must have heard what he had the volume up on animal planet it's actually a good idea they're coming okay see if you can find him before he hurts anyone else okay i just wanted to go swimming today Take the left, take the left, secure it, secure it. Stand Suspects were GOA. Really? Where's the ADA? It's Joe. It's Vargas. I just got a call from the hotel. What the hell is going on over there? Yeah, we had a bit of a situation, but everybody seems to be okay. Just tell me Lohan is okay. That's not telling me he's okay joe it's chandler lohan's been kidnapped what you guys were on him he wanted privacy so did farkas drag you up to the pool no did he just ask good news is we have the body of one of the attackers give me that joe i wasn't at the pool okay yeah i don't really care we've all prints on our dead guy and you just find me some connection to the boost of monty's since that's probably who's got him and tell me no more you make sure this stays in house is that his phone it's gabe's girlfriend she might know where he went tyler, it's Detective Chandler. What's going on? They're saying I can't come up. Is Gabe okay? Look, I know that you were out to get his meds. Does that mean that you are aware of what they're for? Oh my God, is that what happened up there? Did anybody see him? He escaped before anyone got here. I'm the only one who knows. Do you have any idea where he is? No, he's never been out in the world in this state before i his medication hasn't been working that well and he told me but he must have come down by now once he's in the state there is no coming down there isn't not without his meds okay do you have them on you yeah okay don't move i'll be right there okay quit worrying about meeting sarah's got a bigger problem on our hands. Like, there's someone else in the world now with corrupted DNA. Oh, God. She is pregnant? No, Gabe. Gabe got her pregnant? Gabe is the one with corrupted DNA. Where's the trach gun? I'm sorry, what? Apparently, Merfield did experiments on him when he was a child. He's a suit. How does he even function? He's got pills pills what kind of pills i don't know okay i just found out about it myself we spent 10 years what do we miss all i know is that he is at large in new york city you know muirfield gave it to him when he was a kid that's like 20 years earlier than when you got it must have been a different cocktail he's like a first a first gen. Yeah, first gen. Great. Now, where's the trunk? Uh, the box with the kitchen stuff. I, oh my God, I can't go to dinner with Sarah's parents. It's not even safe. Those DeMontes. They're the ones that just shot at Gabe. He's probably stalking them right now. It's one of DeMontes' friends from Gabe's files you getting anything rubber gasoline vinegar it's what they used to break down heroin it's a drug gang 25 million in transactions a year speaking of i got gabe's meds from his girlfriend she says he needs like 10 of them but there's more than that so maybe we can give one to jt actually jt just pointed out the gauge like first gen and i'm okay it's like a an old smartphone versus a new one they don't even use the same plug well it's worth a shot katherine i thought you were fine with the way things are now why are you being so negative about this i'm not i just i don't want you to get your hopes up okay i'm fine if this doesn't work really because the minute you found out about gabe you're off your post you're dragging me to some high security hotel i thought that you would want to know about it or maybe it's because you want the things that i can't give you and you thought this would be the answer. Vincent, I keep telling you, I don't need a picket fence. But I do need a guy who's going to at least try to have a future. Something's up there. Gabe? I don't know, but it's not human. Okay, you go that way, I'll go on the other side. Who the hell are you? Hey, I was just looking for someone. Okay, trust me, man. You don't want to let me go. Is there some kind of retaliation? No, but there might be some coming your way. Sounds like a threat. Just a warning. Oh, my God. Someone else back there? There was. Chester's found another address in Gabe's files. It was written hotel stationery So he probably just wrote it down today It's your place Why? How did you know where I live? Wait Tracking device You must have planted it this morning Of course Come into my precinct The task force, Gabeal drive isn't to go after the boost of monty's it's to go after you um um just i'm not feeling great and i don't want i don't want to get you and your parents sick um hold on i got a call waiting. Hey, hey, you at home? You gotta get out of there right now. Gabe is after me and he probably doesn't look like
